title: Database Administrator I
description: Zoom seeks a Database Administrator I to manage and optimize our databases supporting global communications infrastructure.
responsibilities: Install, configure, and maintain database management systems
Optimize database performance and query execution
Implement backup and disaster recovery strategies
Monitor database health and troubleshoot issues
Manage user accounts and security access controls

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; relevant degree or certification strongly preferred

benefits: Competitive salary with annual equity grants
Flexible time off and work arrangements
